parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email'
SELECT row_to_json(s) AS dashboard FROM security_dashboard s;

SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.occurred_at DESC) AS events FROM (
  SELECT event_type, severity, source_ip, endpoint, description, occurred_at
    FROM security_events
   WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '7 days'
   ORDER BY CASE severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 0 WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, occurred_at DESC
   LIMIT 30
) t;
